title: Emma's Rainbow of Feelings
synopsis: Emma learns about different emotions throughout her day with help from her loving family, discovering that all feelings are okay and how to express them in healthy ways.

pages.text: Emma woke up feeling grumpy. Her toy was broken and she couldn't find her favorite socks. Red feelings swirled inside her tummy like a storm.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting on her bed looking upset, surrounded by swirling red angry emotions in the background like storm clouds
illustration.alt: Emma looking angry with red swirling emotions around her

pages.text: "I'm MAD!" Emma shouted. Mommy came over and sat down. "It's okay to feel mad, Emma. Let's take some deep breaths together."

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting with her mother, both taking deep breaths as the red swirls begin to calm into softer colors
illustration.alt: Emma and her mother breathing together as angry feelings start to calm

pages.text: Emma breathed in and out. The red feelings got smaller. Mommy hugged her tight and helped fix her toy. Emma felt much better.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks hugging her mother, with gentle pink and orange colors replacing the red swirls in the background
illustration.alt: Emma hugging her mother with calmer, warmer colors around them

pages.text: Later, Emma felt sad. It was raining and she couldn't play outside. Blue feelings dropped down like raindrops in her heart.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks looking out the window at rain, with blue teardrop-like emotions falling around her like gentle rain
illustration.alt: Emma looking sad by the window with blue raindrop emotions around her

pages.text: Daddy saw Emma's sad face. "Would you like to tell me about your blue feelings?" he asked softly. Emma nodded and climbed onto his lap.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting on her father's lap, blue emotions softening into lighter blue clouds around them
illustration.alt: Emma sitting with her father as sad feelings begin to lighten

pages.text: "I wanted to play outside," Emma said. Daddy smiled. "We can have fun inside too! Let's build a blanket fort." The blue feelings started floating away.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks building a blanket fort with her father, blue emotions transforming into purple and green creative swirls
illustration.alt: Emma and her father building a fort with colorful creative emotions swirling around

pages.text: At dinner, Emma felt happy. Her whole family was together, and they made her favorite soup. Golden sunshine feelings bubbled up inside her.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting at the dinner table with her family, surrounded by warm yellow sunshine rays and golden bubbles of joy
illustration.alt: Emma at dinner with her family surrounded by golden happy emotions

pages.text: "I love you, Mommy and Daddy," Emma giggled. Her parents smiled big smiles. "We love you too, Emma. All of your feelings make you special."

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks hugging both parents, with warm rainbow colors swirling gently around the happy family
illustration.alt: Emma hugging her parents with warm rainbow emotions surrounding the loving family

pages.text: Emma learned that feelings come and go like colors in the sky. Mad, sad, and happy feelings are all okay. Her family helps her understand them all.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks playing happily with a rainbow of gentle emotions swirling around her like a beautiful sky
illustration.alt: Emma playing with a rainbow of emotions swirling around her like a colorful sky

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color were Emma's mad feelings?
questions.explanation: Emma's mad feelings were red like swirling storm clouds!

questions.question: Who helped Emma when she felt mad?
questions.explanation: Mommy helped Emma take deep breaths when she felt mad.

questions.question: What did Emma and Daddy build together?
questions.explanation: Emma and Daddy built a blanket fort when she felt sad about not playing outside.

questions.question: How did Emma's family feel about all her different feelings?
choices: they said all feelings are okay
questions.explanation: Emma's family told her that all of her feelings make her special and are okay to have.
